name: Elementsaber Molehu
name_jp: エレメントセイバー・モーレフ
desc: Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 "Elementsaber" monster from your hand to the GY, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; change it to face-down Defense Position. Once per turn, if this card is in the GY: You can declare 1 Attribute; this card in the GY becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 "Elementsaber" monster from your hand to the GY, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; change it to face-down Defense Position. Once per turn, if this card is in the GY: You can declare 1 Attribute; this card in the GY becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
